description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style hand tool with a yellow-painted metal body and two elongated black handles. The tool features a prominent pivot joint near the head, with several visible rivets and bolts along the side, indicating a heavy-duty construction. The handles are straight, covered in a textured black material for improved grip, and are slightly separated, suggesting spring-loaded or manual operation. The head of the tool is angular, with a small, round jaw opening at the tip, designed for gripping or fastening tasks, likely for use with rivets or similar fasteners. The yellow body is marked with visible wear and scratches, and a logo or brand name is printed on the side. This tool is commonly found in urban garages, workshops, or construction sites for mechanical or assembly work.
description: A heavy-duty yellow hand tool with black textured handles and a prominent pivot joint, designed for gripping or fastening tasks. The body shows wear and features a visible brand logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the tool, with the jaw opening and the alignment of the handles visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the yellow metal body, black handles, pivot joint, and visible brand logo, as well as the tool's overall length.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the alignment of the handles, the row of rivets, and the flatness of the tool's body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the angular head, handle separation, and the tool's robust construction.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, elongated handles with black textured or rubberized grips for comfort and slip resistance.
attribute_jaw_design: Short, round jaw opening at the tip, likely with a rivet-setting or gripping feature, designed for fastening rather than cutting.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Fixed pivot joint with visible rivets, allowing for a single, strong squeezing action without adjustable jaw width.
attribute_grip_pattern: Handles feature a ribbed or textured pattern, likely rubberized, for enhanced grip and tactile feedback.
attribute_visible_brand_or_logo: Visible; the text 'Arcus' and a triangular logo are present on the yellow body.
